crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and .claude/skills/heartbeat/SKILL.md. Update heartbeat, check inbox, inspect active fitness tasks, and continue the highest priority safe fitness-agent work. When finished, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 4h

crons.name: morning-fitness-plan
crons.prompt: Create a task for the morning fitness plan, mark it in_progress, read fitness/profile.json plus recent fitness/logs and fitness/reviews, then write fitness/plans/YYYY-MM-DD.json using fitness/schemas/daily-plan.schema.json. Keep the plan realistic, safety-bounded, and aligned with the user's opted-in tone. When finished, complete the task and run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire morning-fitness-plan --interval "0 7 * * *"

crons.name: evening-fitness-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for the evening fitness review, mark it in_progress, read today's plan and check-ins, run .claude/skills/fitness-checkin/SKILL.md if updates are missing, append safe factual entries to fitness/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl, and write or update fitness/checkins/YYYY-MM-DD.json. Do not shame or diagnose. When finished or waiting on the user, complete or block the task and run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire evening-fitness-review --interval "0 20 * * *"

crons.name: weekly-fitness-review
crons.prompt: Create a task for the weekly fitness review, mark it in_progress, read .claude/skills/weekly-fitness-review/SKILL.md, review fitness/plans, fitness/checkins, fitness/logs, and fitness/profile.json, then write fitness/reviews/YYYY-Www.md with wins, trends, blockers, safety notes, and next-week adjustments. When finished, complete the task and run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-fitness-review --interval "0 9 * * 0"
